manifest.note: Paper theme content (design-v5) — upgrade on v1 with the same four pages (Home / Capability matrix / Career record / Dossier appendix). Pairs with the Paper preset + single-page scroll layout. The v5 mobile-responsive top bar + language-picker layout is a frontend concern, not a bundle concern — see scss/Layout and scss/global.scss for the mitigations that land alongside this bundle.
